title: Raw Image Viewer configuration
description: Configuration for rendering raw binary image files with the Raw Image Viewer VS Code extension.

match.description: Glob pattern (`.editorconfig`-style) matched against the file path relative to this .rawimagerc file's directory.

headerSize.description: Number of bytes to skip at the start of the file.

format.description: Pixel format used to interpret the binary image data.
enumDescriptions: Planar YUV 4:2:0 — requires even width and height (1.5 bytes/pixel)
Semi-planar YUV 4:2:0 — requires even width and height (1.5 bytes/pixel)
Packed YUV 4:2:2 — requires even width (2 bytes/pixel)
32-bit float grayscale, little-endian — auto window/level (4 bytes/pixel)

patterns.description: Ordered list of glob-pattern rules to configure rendering for specific files or subdirectories. Each entry's "match" glob is evaluated against the file path relative to this .rawimagerc's directory. When multiple entries match the same file, their fields are merged in array order with later entries winning (an earlier entry's field is only overridden if a later matching entry also specifies it).
